entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A validated public item transfer commits to a stable seat.
required_facts: The item was acquired by the acting stable seat.

variants.spooky: {seat} takes the {item_name}. The harbor has noted the change in ownership.
variants.grim: {seat} acquires the {item_name}. Its current condition and charges remain authoritative.
variants.gore_and_dread: {seat} lifts the {item_name} from the water. Something beneath it releases the object reluctantly.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: An otherwise legal pickup is rejected because the stable seat lacks required inventory capacity.
required_facts: The acting seat has insufficient inventory capacity.

variants.spooky: {seat} has room for no additional burden. Choose what deserves to be carried.
variants.grim: {seat} has insufficient inventory capacity. Drop, trade, or decline an eligible item.
variants.gore_and_dread: {seat} can carry no more. The harbor waits to see which burden is left in the water.

entries.fallback: {seat} has insufficient inventory capacity. No item was acquired.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A validated action drops a publicly tracked quest item into a named public space.
required_facts: The quest item is now board-owned at the named space.

variants.spooky: The {item_name} falls in {space_name}. Its importance remains inconveniently public.
variants.grim: The {item_name} is now located in {space_name}. Recovery remains possible while the route is valid.
variants.gore_and_dread: The {item_name} sinks into the filth at {space_name}. The objective marker follows it down.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A validated rope action stabilizes a connector or completes a rescue.
required_facts: The named route or rescue receives the authored effect.

variants.spooky: The rope holds. For one crossing, so does the town.
variants.grim: The rope is secured. Apply the accepted stabilization or rescue effect.
variants.gore_and_dread: The rope draws tight above the black water. Several hands below pull in the opposite direction and fail.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A flood or hazard commits and changes the public Dry Matches condition to unusable.
required_facts: No ignition action remains on those matches.

variants.spooky: The matches are wet. Optimism may still be struck, though it burns poorly.
variants.grim: The Dry Matches are unusable after water exposure.
variants.gore_and_dread: Water swells the match heads into pale pulp. Nothing in the box will burn but the smell.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A public item receives the claimed condition through a validated Harbor effect.
required_facts: Its ending or interaction implications may have changed.

variants.spooky: The harbor has taken an interest in the {item_name}. Review what the claim permits.
variants.grim: The {item_name} is now claimed. Review its updated public restrictions and ending effects.
variants.gore_and_dread: Wet fingerprints close around the {item_name} without touching it. The harbor now considers it shared property.

entries.fallback: The {item_name} is claimed. Review its updated effects.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A validated hazard reduces public lifeboat capacity by one.
required_facts: Current passenger eligibility must be reviewed.

variants.spooky: One place in the lifeboat is gone. The passenger list has become more selective.
variants.grim: Lifeboat capacity decreased by one. Review repairs and eligible passengers.
variants.gore_and_dread: A bench splits and drops through the hull. One promised place fills with black water.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A validated hazard marks a named public space for imminent collapse.
required_facts: Affected seats have a legal response window.

variants.spooky: The street beneath {space_name} has begun making decisions. Move, stabilize it, or accept what follows.
variants.grim: {space_name} is unstable. Use an available response before the hazard resolves.
variants.gore_and_dread: The stones at {space_name} split like teeth. Water and pale fingers press upward through the opening.

entries.fallback: {space_name} is unstable. Choose a legal response before resolution.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A validated current hazard moves a public item from its prior location.
required_facts: The named item changed location through the current.
Its new public location must be reviewed.

variants.spooky: The current takes the {item_name}. It does not intend to use it responsibly.
variants.grim: The current moved the {item_name}. Review its new public location.
variants.gore_and_dread: Black water closes around the {item_name} and carries it through hands that never reach the surface.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: The Drowned Archive collapse window begins after validation.
required_facts: The group must prioritize among currently legal recovery objectives.

variants.spooky: The Archive is folding inward. Save the truth, the lock, the missing name, or the person beneath them.
variants.grim: The Drowned Archive is collapsing. Choose the remaining recoverable objective before the window closes.
variants.gore_and_dread: Shelves buckle into the water while drowned hands sort the falling pages by the deaths written upon them.

entries.fallback: The Drowned Archive is collapsing. Choose one remaining legal recovery objective.
